message:
fix(net/tcp): replace fallback thread spawns with inline sleep to prevent thread explosion

Both TcpListener::accept and TcpStream fallback_rewake() spawned a
background thread to sleep and wake the task when no timer driver was
present. Under sustained load without a timer driver this could spawn
unbounded threads, each consuming a stack and OS thread.

Replace the thread::spawn + sleep + wake pattern with inline
thread::sleep + wake_by_ref. This blocks the current worker briefly
(FALLBACK_IO_BACKOFF duration) but prevents thread explosion. The timer
driver path remains unchanged and is the preferred production path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
